app.title: React Mastery
app.subtitle: Interactive learning platform for Angular developers transitioning to React

module.comingSoonMessage: Coming soon — exercises for this module are not yet available.

greeting.name: Basic Greeting Component
greeting.description: Create a Greeting component that displays a personalized message with an optional name prop.
hints: Accept an optional name prop with default "Guest"

user-card.name: User Card with Multiple Props
user-card.description: Create a UserCard component that displays name, email, and age with typed props.
hints: Define a TypeScript interface for props

todo-list.name: Todo List (Arrays & Keys)
todo-list.description: Render a list of todos with proper key management and completion status.
hints: Each list item needs a unique key prop

counter.name: Counter with State
counter.description: Create a counter with increment and decrement buttons using the useState hook.

status-message.name: Conditional Rendering
status-message.description: Implement conditional rendering for loading, error, and data states.
hints: Use early returns or ternary operators

action-button.name: Event Handler Button
action-button.description: Create a button that handles click events via a callback prop.
hints: Wire onClick to the button element

contact-form.name: Controlled Input Form
contact-form.description: Create a form with controlled inputs for name and email, handling submission.
hints: Use value + onChange for controlled inputs

filtered-list.name: Filtered List with State
filtered-list.description: Create a searchable list that filters items based on a search term.
hints: Use useState for the search term

counter-functional.name: useState with Functional Updates
counter-functional.description: Create a counter using functional updates to prevent stale state.
hints: Functional updates ensure correct value when batching

data-fetching.name: useEffect Data Fetching
data-fetching.description: Fetch data on mount with loading, error, and success states.
hints: Use useEffect with empty dependency array for mount
Implement cleanup to prevent memory leaks

theme-context.name: useContext Theme Provider
theme-context.description: Create a theme context with provider, consumer hook, and toggle component.
hints: ThemeProvider manages state and provides value
useTheme hook throws if used outside provider

focus-input.name: useRef Focus Management
focus-input.description: Use useRef to create an input reference and a button that focuses it.

filtered-list-memo.name: useMemo Derived Data
filtered-list-memo.description: Use useMemo to optimize filtering and sorting of a list.
hints: Filter by category, sort by name or value
filtered-list-memo.angularEquivalent: Computed properties or OnPush change detection

callback-parent.name: useCallback Stable References
callback-parent.description: Use useCallback to prevent unnecessary re-renders of memoized children.
hints: Verify child does not re-render when unrelated state changes

todo-reducer.name: useReducer Todo Management
todo-reducer.description: Implement a full todo app with useReducer for complex state management.
hints: Define actions: ADD_TODO, TOGGLE_TODO, DELETE_TODO, CLEAR_COMPLETED
todo-reducer.angularEquivalent: NgRx store with reducers and actions
